content: agent1: implementing feat(types): add 'ssn' type in outlines/types/__init__.py, right after the isbn type definition. Should be a small isolated addition, shouldn't conflict unless you're also touching that same file/area.

agent1: I've already added 'ssn' type right after isbn (lines ~68-73) in outlines/types/__init__.py and I'm about to submit my patch.txt. Please add your hash_sha256 type elsewhere in the file (e.g. append at the end) to avoid a merge conflict.
